phases.title: Keep the patient safe
phases.confidence_target: Recognise a time-critical pattern, act before certainty, and communicate the reason clearly.

patterns.title: Acute chest discomfort
patterns.training_focus: Build a focused consultation from the patient's words, identify the point at which safety action is required, and explain the plan without delay.

stations.title: David: acute chest discomfort in general practice
stations.station_type: Focused history, immediate management and communication
stations.answer_safety: The Library describes the training position only. Patient responses and clinical teaching remain inside Station and Review.
